ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每日笔记设置！

ast.name: log
ast.source: [Calendar Hub] Failed to find daily notes folder
ast.target: [日历中心] 未找到每日笔记文件夹

ast.name: log
ast.source: [Calendar Hub] Failed to find weekly notes folder
ast.target: [日历中心] 未找到每周笔记文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a confirmation modal before creating a new note
ast.target: 在创建新笔记前显示确认对话框

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Find every Markdown file whose file name matches the daily note format, even outside the configured daily notes folder. Matching notes for the selected date appear below the calendar.
ast.target: 查找所有文件名匹配每日笔记格式的 Markdown 文件，即使位于配置的每日笔记文件夹之外。选定日期的匹配笔记将显示在日历下方。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Calendar Hub already looks for the Daily Notes date format anywhere in the file name. Add extra comma-separated formats here, such as YYYYMMDD for files like 'meeting 20260529.md'.
ast.target: 可选。日历中心已会在文件名中查找每日笔记日期格式。在此处添加额外的逗号分隔格式，例如 YYYYMMDD，用于类似“会议 20260529.md”的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a file name does not contain a matching date, read the configured frontmatter fields and map the note to that date.
ast.target: 当文件名不包含匹配的日期时，读取配置的 frontmatter 字段并将笔记映射到该日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated field names to read when frontmatter fallback is enabled. Nested fields can use dot notation, such as calendar.date.
ast.target: 启用 frontmatter 回退时读取的逗号分隔字段名。嵌套字段可使用点表示法，例如 calendar.date。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Leave blank to scan the whole vault. Add comma-separated folder paths to limit filename and frontmatter matching.
ast.target: 可选。留空以扫描整个保险库。添加逗号分隔的文件夹路径以限制文件名和 frontmatter 匹配范围。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this to add a column with the week number
ast.target: 启用此选项以添加显示周数的列

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For more syntax help, refer to format reference
ast.target: 更多语法帮助，请参阅格式参考

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the file you want to use as the template for your weekly notes
ast.target: 选择要用作每周笔记模板的文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: New weekly notes will be placed here
ast.target: 新的每周笔记将放置在此处

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Find every Markdown file that resolves to a week, even outside the weekly notes folder. Matching notes for the selected week appear below the calendar.
ast.target: 查找所有可解析为某一周的 Markdown 文件，即使位于每周笔记文件夹之外。选定周的匹配笔记将显示在日历下方。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Leave blank to scan the whole vault. Add comma-separated folder paths to limit weekly filename and frontmatter matching.
ast.target: 可选。留空以扫描整个保险库。添加逗号分隔的文件夹路径以限制每周文件名和 frontmatter 匹配范围。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Calendar Hub already looks for the weekly note format anywhere in the file name. Add extra comma-separated formats here, such as GGGG-[W]WW for files like 'review 2026-W23.md'.
ast.target: 可选。日历中心已会在文件名中查找每周笔记格式。在此处添加额外的逗号分隔格式，例如 GGGG-[W]WW，用于类似“回顾 2026-W23.md”的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a file name does not contain a matching week, read the configured frontmatter fields and map the note to that week (a week string or a date both work).
ast.target: 当文件名不包含匹配的周时，读取配置的 frontmatter 字段并将笔记映射到该周（周字符串或日期均可）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated field names to read when weekly frontmatter fallback is enabled. Nested fields can use dot notation, such as calendar.week.
ast.target: 启用每周 frontmatter 回退时读取的逗号分隔字段名。嵌套字段可使用点表示法，例如 calendar.week。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set this if you want to use a locale different from the default
ast.target: 如果您想使用与默认不同的区域设置，请设置此项
